key_risk_factors: Customer data used for product improvement without explicit opt-in
Usage-based pricing with potential for significant increases
missing_information: Clear documentation of rate limits for APIs
Detailed information on data deletion and retention policies
case_1_1.business_recommendation: Proceed with caution, negotiate a pilot project to test vendor capabilities and data handling practices before committing to a large-scale deployment

case_1_2.rationale: The proposed AI customer support chatbot initiative has the potential to improve response times and reduce ticket load, but it requires careful consideration of implementation readiness, governance maturity, and compliance risks.
operational_considerations: Integration with existing customer support systems
people_impact: Potential job losses among human agents
Need for retraining or upskilling of agents to work with the chatbot
compliance_risks: Handling of personal information in customer support tickets
Need for AI governance policies to ensure compliance
conditions_for_approval: Development of a data protection plan to handle personal information
Retraining or upskilling of human agents to work with the chatbot
Regular review and assessment of the chatbot's performance and impact
case_1_2.final_recommendation: Approve the proposed AI customer support chatbot initiative with the conditions outlined above to ensure a successful and compliant implementation.
